serverInfo.name: heor-agent-mcp
serverInfo.description: AI-powered Health Economics and Outcomes Research (HEOR) MCP server. 21 tools for literature search (44 data sources incl. OHE and EuroQol), risk of bias assessment (RoB 2/ROBINS-I/AMSTAR-2 with GRADE integration), cost-effectiveness modeling (Markov/PartSA with PSA/EVPPI/scenarios, QALY + evLYG summary metrics), budget impact analysis, abstract screening, survival curve fitting, indirect comparisons (Bucher/NMA/MAIC/STC) with I²/Cochran Q heterogeneity, ITC feasibility assessment (3-assumption framework), pharmacovigilance study classification (PASS/PAES/RMP/DUS/registry per EMA GVP rev 4), EU Joint Clinical Assessment (JCA) PICO matrix analyzer (DE/FR/IT/ES/NL + UK context), MAIC pipeline orchestration, HTA dossier prep (NICE/EMA/FDA/IQWiG/HAS/EU JCA) with auto-GRADE + PV plan + NICE severity modifier + health inequalities, UK EQ-5D-5L value set impact estimator, examples + recipe templates.

optional.description: Optional bearer token for production hardening

tools.name: literature.search
tools.description: Search 41 data sources with PRISMA audit trail and runs=3 stability deduplication.

tools.name: literature.screen
tools.description: PICO-based abstract screening with study design classification (Cochrane Handbook Ch. 4).

tools.name: evidence.network
tools.description: Build treatment comparison network, assess NMA feasibility.

tools.name: evidence.indirect
tools.description: Bucher method and Frequentist NMA for indirect treatment comparisons.

tools.name: evidence.population_adjusted
tools.description: MAIC/STC per NICE DSU TSD 18 (summary-level data, no IPD required).

tools.name: evidence.survival
tools.description: Fit 5 parametric distributions (Exp/Weibull/Log-logistic/Log-normal/Gompertz) to KM data with AIC/BIC (NICE DSU TSD 14).

tools.name: models.cost_effectiveness
tools.description: Markov/PartSA with PSA, OWSA, CEAC, EVPI, EVPPI, scenario analysis. Outputs text/JSON/DOCX/XLSX.

tools.name: models.budget_impact
tools.description: ISPOR-compliant BIA with market share uptake, population growth, treatment displacement.

tools.name: evidence.risk_of_bias
tools.description: Cochrane RoB 2 (RCTs), ROBINS-I (observational), AMSTAR-2 (systematic reviews). Auto-detects instrument from study_type. Returns GRADE Risk of Bias domain summary to pass to hta_dossier_prep.

tools.name: hta.dossier
tools.description: NICE STA, EMA, FDA, IQWiG, HAS, EU JCA templates with auto-GRADE evidence quality tables. Accepts rob_results from risk_of_bias for structured RoB domain.

tools.name: utils.validate_links
tools.description: HTTP validation of URLs to prevent broken citation links.

tools.name: project.create
tools.description: Initialize persistent project workspace at ~/.heor-agent/projects/.

tools.name: knowledge.search
tools.description: Full-text search across project raw/ and wiki/.

tools.name: knowledge.read
tools.description: Read files from a project knowledge base.

tools.name: knowledge.write
tools.description: Write to project wiki/ (Obsidian-compatible, YAML frontmatter + wikilinks).

tools.name: hta.utility
tools.description: EQ-5D value set reference (UK 3L/England 5L/new UK 5L 2026/DSU mapping) and NICE 5L transition impact estimator. Cites Biz, Hernández Alava, Wailoo (2026) Value in Health.

tools.name: evidence.itc
tools.description: Assess ITC feasibility via the 3-assumption framework (exchangeability, homogeneity, consistency). Recommends Bucher/NMA/MAIC/STC/ML-NMR or infeasible. Cites Cope 2014, NICE DSU TSD 18, Signorovitch 2023, Cochrane Ch 10-11.

tools.name: examples
tools.description: Pre-filled JSON inputs for heavy-schema tools + maic_workflow_recipe (multi-step prompt template for ChatGPT users).

tools.name: workflow.maic
tools.description: One-shot MAIC pipeline orchestrator: ITC feasibility + parallel literature_search (broad + per-trial) + screen_abstracts + risk_of_bias + evidence_network. Returns a 9-section structured report. Stops short of MAIC/Bucher itself (those need IPD).

tools.name: pv.classify
tools.description: Classify a planned study into its EMA pharmacovigilance regulatory category (PASS imposed/voluntary, PAES, RMP Annex 4, DUS, registry, pregnancy registry, spontaneous reporting, ICH E2E plan). Maps to GVP module + ENCePP template + RMP/FDA implications. Pass result to hta_dossier for the PV Plan section.

tools.name: jca.pico_scope
tools.description: Produce the canonical EU Joint Clinical Assessment (JCA) PICO matrix for a drug-indication pair across selected EU jurisdictions (DE/FR/IT/ES/NL + UK context). Returns consolidated PICO list per Reg. 2021/2282, country-specific comparator universes, outcome instrument preferences, population subgroups, and a heterogeneity warning. Pipe pico_matrix.picos into hta_dossier for a multi-PICO JCA dossier.
